---
title: "Jiho Min"
image: profile.png
include-before-body: []
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 380px
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jiho-m0521
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kr.jiho0521@gmail.com
---

::: {.hero-copy}
### Student builder interested in software, finance, and learning tools.

I am Jiho Min, a South Korean-American middle school student who likes turning ideas into useful web apps. I build projects around education, sports, data, and everyday workflows, with a focus on practical products that people can actually use.

I am especially interested in technology, finance, economics, and translation. My work combines coding, product thinking, and clear communication across Korean and English.

::: {.hero-actions}
[View Projects](#featured-projects){.primary-action}
[Contact Me](mailto:kr.jiho0521@gmail.com){.secondary-action}
:::
:::

::: {.quick-facts}
::: {.fact-card}
**Focus**

Full-stack web apps, learning tools, and data dashboards
:::

::: {.fact-card}
**Current Context**

Middle school student and Seocho Middle School soccer club member
:::

::: {.fact-card}
**Working Style**

Solo builder who designs, develops, tests, and ships projects end to end
:::
:::

## Core Skills

::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-group}
### Web & App Development

`TypeScript` `React` `Vite` `Python` `Streamlit` `Django` `HTML` `CSS`
:::

::: {.skill-group}
### Data & Learning Tools

`Pandas` `Plotly` `SQLite` `IndexedDB` `Excel/CSV` `SRS` `Anki-style learning`
:::

::: {.skill-group}
### Product & Workflow

`GitHub` `Netlify` `Quarto` `Notion` `Canva` `Automation`
:::
:::

## Featured Projects

::: {.projects-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### SentenceAnki

An effective sentence memorization web app that helps learners study English sentences through fill-in-the-blank practice, imports, review history, and local-first study data.

**Role:** Solo full-stack developer  
**Stack:** TypeScript, React, Vite, Netlify Functions, Netlify Blobs, Supabase, IndexedDB, SQL.js, XLSX, Vitest

::: {.project-links}
[Live Demo](https://anki.mjiho.com){.project-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/jiho-m0521/SentenceAnki){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Seocho Middle School Soccer Club Website

A soccer club website built for Seocho Middle School, including team information, match schedules, player profiles, and performance statistics.

**Role:** Solo developer  
**Stack:** Python, Streamlit, Pandas, Plotly

::: {.project-links}
[Live Demo](https://seochofc.streamlit.app){.project-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/jiho-m0521/seochofc){.project-link}
:::
:::
:::

## Beyond Code

::: {.closing-panel}
I also contribute as a translator for international websites, helping make information easier to access across languages. I want this portfolio to show not only what I have built, but also how I learn: by exploring real problems, making useful tools, and improving each project after it ships.
:::
